message:
✨ Add prominent cluster context badges to all cards (#34)

* ✨ Add prominent cluster context badges to all cards

## Summary
- Add ClusterBadge component with consistent color-coding by environment
- Update all multi-cluster cards to show cluster prominently at top of each item
- Add hover tooltip with cluster info (environment, region detection)

## Cards Updated
- PodIssues, SecurityIssues, TopPods, EventStream
- DeploymentStatus, DeploymentProgress, DeploymentIssues
- GitOpsDrift, AppStatus

## Cluster Badge Features
- Color coded: prod=green, staging=yellow, dev=blue, test=orange, edge=cyan
- Auto-detects environment from cluster name
- Auto-detects region patterns (us-east, eu-west, etc.)
- Hover tooltip shows full cluster details

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix TypeScript errors: add fallback for optional cluster prop

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
